channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Supreme Court clears way for Trump administration to revive restrictive policy for asylum seekers
item.description: The Supreme Court has cleared the way for the Trump administration to potentially revive an immigration policy once used to turn back migrants seeking asylum at the U.S.

item.title: The Supreme Court lets the Trump administration end legal protections for Haitians and Syrians
Supreme Court ruling blocks thousands of lawsuits against maker of Roundup weedkiller
